do_not_claim: legal maritime boundaries (sea zones are gameplay abstractions)
complete population fidelity without documented raster inputs
complete global historical politics outside priority theaters
era-aware borders for pre-modern or wartime maps
geometry_quality_description: Modern open-geodata scaffold only. Politics project modern parent_country_id (or coarse demo remaps). Not a claim of historical accuracy for any pre-modern or wartime era.
honest_statements: Province polygons come from modern Natural Earth (and optional admin candidates), not from proprietary game maps.
Scenario ownership is a separate layer; geometry is not rewritten per era unless a period-geometry tier is claimed.
official-1836, official-1444: curated-politics era program(s)—major-power tags and priority theaters are human-reviewed overlays, not period geometry.
Redistribute with attribution.json and the release manifest.
politics_quality_description: Human-reviewed owner/controller/cores/claims for priority regions and/or global major tags. Geometry may still be modern scaffold.

quality_tier_catalog.description: Modern open-geodata scaffold only. Politics project modern parent_country_id (or coarse demo remaps). Not a claim of historical accuracy for any pre-modern or wartime era.
Human-reviewed owner/controller/cores/claims for priority regions and/or global major tags. Geometry may still be modern scaffold.
Era-aware province shapes or boundary hints where modern admin outlines would fail a historian or Paradox-eye sniff test.

scenario_notes: modern-baseline: projects each land province's modern parent_country_id to owner/controller. Scaffold only.
official-1836: curated-politics 1836 ownership overlay with elevated Europe / North America / colonial theater depth. Geometry remains modern scaffold; not Paradox-grade completeness.

official-1444: curated-politics 1444 ownership overlay with Europe-first elevated depth (HRE, Italy, Iberia, France/Burgundy, British Isles, east Europe) plus global major tags. Geometry remains modern scaffold; not Paradox-grade completeness.
summary: Profile `modern-small`. Beta release: geometry=scaffold-baseline, politics=curated-politics. Modern open-geodata scaffold is the engineering foundation—not a final claim of historical truth.
